user_query:
I need to put sane log rotation in place so our POS and kitchen display terminals don’t fill up local disks. Using the files in this workspace, please do the following:

Inputs:
- input/logs/pos_front.log
- input/logs/kitchen_display.log
- input/config/logrotate_template.conf
- input/docs/IT_Policies.md

Requirements:
1) Compute the size in bytes of each log file under input/logs. Let Smax be the larger of the two sizes. Compute rotate_size_bytes as the smallest multiple of 1 MiB (MiB = 1,048,576 bytes) that is greater than or equal to 1.2 × Smax. Keep count should be 7 rotated files.
2) Produce an updated logrotate configuration by filling in the placeholders in input/config/logrotate_template.conf and write the result to output/config/logrotate.conf. Replace:
   - LOG_PATH_1 with input/logs/pos_front.log
   - LOG_PATH_2 with input/logs/kitchen_display.log
   - {{ROTATE_SIZE_BYTES}} with the computed rotate_size_bytes
   - {{KEEP_COUNT}} with 7
   Keep the rest of the template structure and options unchanged.
3) Create a machine-readable summary at output/reports/log_sizes.json with the following exact JSON shape:
   {
     "files": [
       {"path": "input/logs/pos_front.log", "size_bytes": <int>},
       {"path": "input/logs/kitchen_display.log", "size_bytes": <int>}
     ],
     "rotate_size_bytes": <int>,
     "keep_count": 7
   }
4) Edit the existing file input/docs/IT_Policies.md in place. In the section titled "Log Retention Policy", replace the TODO with a concise policy that states:
   - The target files (both exact paths as above),
   - The rotation trigger (by size, using the computed rotate_size_bytes, also include its value in MiB rounded to two decimals),
   - The retention (keep 7), and
   - A brief note that compress, missingok, copytruncate, and notifempty are enabled.
   Do not alter any other sections.

Outputs to produce:
- output/config/logrotate.conf (placeholders replaced as specified)
- output/reports/log_sizes.json (exact structure as specified)
- input/docs/IT_Policies.md (edited in place as specified)

Please do not run logrotate or depend on any external systems; just produce the files above based on the inputs and the rules here. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
